title: Landing page loads primary content and can navigate to registration
description: Verifies the landing page shows hero and feature content and the primary CTA navigates to registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the feature cards section
Click the primary call-to-action to get started
Verify the registration page is displayed

title: Landing page language toggle switches content to English
description: Verifies toggling language updates landing page content from Kannada to English.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the site language to English
Verify the landing page content is displayed in English

title: Landing page pricing section displays 4 packs
description: Verifies the pricing section is present and shows four pricing packs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify 4 pricing packs are displayed

title: Landing page can navigate to login
description: Verifies the landing page provides a login entry point and it navigates to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login entry point
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Landing page renders without broken images
description: Verifies images on the landing page render successfully without broken placeholders.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the full landing page
Verify no broken images are visible on the page

title: Registration succeeds with valid inputs and shows email verification prompt
description: Verifies a user can submit the registration form with valid details and see a verification prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Fill a full name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation with an email verification prompt is visible

title: Registration shows validation errors on empty submit then allows correction
description: Verifies required-field validation appears when submitting an empty form and clears after correcting inputs and resubmitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Submit the registration form
Fill a full name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation with an email verification prompt is visible

title: Registration blocks invalid email format
description: Verifies the registration form shows a validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Fill a full name into the name field
Fill invalid text into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Registration blocks weak password
description: Verifies the registration form shows a validation error when the password does not meet requirements.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Fill a full name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a weak password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Login succeeds with valid credentials and lands on dashboard
description: Verifies email/password login completes and the user reaches the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login shows loading state during authentication
description: Verifies submitting login shows a loading spinner while authentication is in progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify a loading spinner is displayed during authentication

title: Login shows error for invalid credentials
description: Verifies login failure displays a Kannada error message when password is incorrect.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill an incorrect password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials error message is visible

title: Login form validates required fields
description: Verifies submitting the login form with empty inputs shows validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Submit the login form
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Login page can navigate to password reset
description: Verifies the forgot-password link routes to the password reset request page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Click the forgot-password link
Verify the password reset request page is displayed

title: Login page can navigate to sign up
description: Verifies the sign-up link routes to the registration page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Click the sign-up link to register
Verify the registration page is displayed

title: Dashboard loads with greeting, stats, and navigation to Generate Order
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the dashboard, see primary content, and navigate to the generate order page from a quick action.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Click the Generate Order quick action
Verify the order generation page is displayed

title: Unauthenticated access to Dashboard redirects to login
description: Verifies that visiting the dashboard route while logged out sends the user to the login page and shows the login form.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Dashboard shows credit warning when credits are zero
description: Verifies the dashboard can display a credit warning state for a user with no remaining credits.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Verify a credit warning is visible when credits are empty

title: Dashboard shows first-time user call-to-action when no orders and no files
description: Verifies the dashboard displays a first-time user CTA state when the account has no order history and no uploaded files.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Verify a first-time user call-to-action is visible

title: Dashboard quick action navigates to AI Training page
description: Verifies the Train AI quick action from the dashboard takes the user to the training upload page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Click Train AI quick action
Verify the AI training page is displayed

title: Dashboard quick action navigates to Billing page
description: Verifies the Buy Credits quick action from the dashboard takes the user to the billing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Click Buy Credits quick action
Verify the billing page is displayed

title: Generate Order page blocks generation when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the generate order form validates required inputs and does not proceed with generation when key fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Submit the generate order request
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Generate Order happy path using manual inputs shows generated text and enables downloads after verification
description: Verifies a user can fill required inputs, generate an order, see generated Kannada text, and enable download controls by completing verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Select an order type
Fill CASE-12345 into the case number field
Fill 42 into the survey number field
Fill Test Village into the village name field
Fill Test Appellant into the appellant name field
Fill a detailed case summary into the case details field
Submit the generate order request
Wait for the generation to complete
Check the verification checkbox to enable downloads
Verify generated Kannada order text is displayed
Verify download actions are enabled

title: Generate Order shows progress indicator during generation
description: Verifies that a progress timer or indicator appears while AI generation is running.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Select an order type
Fill CASE-12346 into the case number field
Fill 43 into the survey number field
Fill Test Village 2 into the village name field
Fill Test Appellant 2 into the appellant name field
Fill a detailed case summary into the case details field
Submit the generate order request
Verify a generation progress indicator is visible

title: Generate Order displays guardrail validation results after generation
description: Verifies that guardrail/validation results are shown after an order is generated.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Select an order type
Fill CASE-12347 into the case number field
Fill 44 into the survey number field
Fill Test Village 3 into the village name field
Fill Test Appellant 3 into the appellant name field
Fill a detailed case summary into the case details field
Submit the generate order request
Wait for the generation to complete
Verify guardrail validation results are displayed

title: Generate Order allows regenerate after an initial generation completes
description: Verifies the regenerate action produces a new generated output state after a completed generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Select an order type
Fill CASE-12348 into the case number field
Fill 45 into the survey number field
Fill Test Village 4 into the village name field
Fill Test Appellant 4 into the appellant name field
Fill a detailed case summary into the case details field
Submit the generate order request
Wait for the generation to complete
Click the regenerate action
Wait for the generation to complete
Verify generated Kannada order text is displayed

title: AI Training page loads and shows upload zone and training status
description: Verifies the training page primary UI is present for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/train
Verify a training file upload zone is displayed
Verify a training status summary is displayed

title: AI Training rejects unsupported file types
description: Verifies the training upload validates file types and shows an error when an unsupported type is added.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/train
Attempt to add an unsupported file type to the training upload zone
Verify a file type validation error is visible
Verify no new file appears in the training files table

title: AI Training upload multiple files shows pipeline progress and file rows
description: Verifies adding multiple supported files starts the upload pipeline and displays rows with statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/train
Add multiple supported training files to the upload zone
Verify an upload pipeline progress display is visible
Verify the training files table shows new file entries

title: AI Training delete a file and confirm removal
description: Verifies a user can delete an uploaded training file via confirmation dialog and the file disappears from the table.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/train
Add one supported training file to the upload zone
Wait for the file to appear in the training files table
Click the delete action for the uploaded file
Confirm deletion in the dialog
Verify the deleted file no longer appears in the training files table

title: Billing page shows pricing packs
description: Verifies authenticated users can load the billing page and see the available credit packs with INR pricing.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/billing
Verify 4 pricing packs are displayed with INR prices

title: Start Razorpay checkout from a selected pack
description: Verifies a user can initiate the checkout flow by selecting a pricing pack.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/billing
Click the buy action for a pricing pack
Verify the Razorpay checkout modal is displayed

title: Close checkout without completing payment
description: Verifies a user can exit the checkout modal and remain on the billing page without a success state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/billing
Click the buy action for a pricing pack
Close the checkout modal
Verify the billing page is displayed with pricing packs available

title: Attempt to buy multiple times while checkout is open
description: Verifies the UI prevents opening overlapping checkout modals or duplicating the checkout surface.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/billing
Click the buy action for a pricing pack
Click the buy action for a different pricing pack
Verify only one checkout modal is displayed

title: Registration page loads and shows registration form
description: Verifies the registration page loads and presents the registration form fields for new users.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/register
Verify the registration form is displayed

title: My Orders page loads and shows orders list or empty state
description: Verifies authenticated users can load My Orders and see either a list of orders or an empty state message.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/my-orders
Verify an orders list is displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Open an order from My Orders list to view details
description: Verifies a user can open an order from the list and see its details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/my-orders
Click an order in the orders list
Verify order details are displayed

title: Download an order as DOCX from order details
description: Verifies the order details view exposes a DOCX download action.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/my-orders
Click an order in the orders list
Click the action to download the order as DOCX
Verify a DOCX download is initiated

title: Search for a non-existent order shows no-results state
description: Verifies searching for an order that does not exist results in a no-results empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/my-orders
Fill a unique non-existent query into the order search field with text NON_EXISTENT_ORDER_123456
Press Enter
Verify a no-results state is displayed

title: Upload page loads and shows upload zone and file list area
description: Verifies authenticated users can load the upload page and see the upload zone and file list section.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/upload
Verify an upload zone is displayed and a file list section is visible

title: Cancel deletion keeps file in list
description: Verifies cancelling deletion in the confirmation dialog does not remove the file from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/upload
Wait for the file list to load
Click the delete action for a file in the list
Cancel deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify the file remains in the file list

title: Delete a file removes it from the list
description: Verifies confirming deletion removes the file entry from the UI list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/upload
Wait for the file list to load
Record the name of the first file in the list
Click the delete action for that file
Confirm deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify the recorded file name is not present in the file list

title: Download an uploaded file from the list
description: Verifies the file list provides a download action that initiates a download for a file.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/upload
Wait for the file list to load
Click the download action for a file in the list
Verify a file download is initiated

title: User Settings: update profile settings and save
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to user settings, update profile details, save, and see a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/user-settings
Fill a new valid value into the profile name field
Save the profile changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile name is displayed

title: User Settings: view account information loads
description: Verifies the user settings page loads and shows account information for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/user-settings
Verify account information is displayed
Verify profile settings controls are available

title: User Settings: change password with incorrect current password shows validation error
description: Verifies changing password fails with an incorrect current password and shows a validation error without updating the password.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/user-settings
Fill an incorrect value into the current password field
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid new password into the confirm new password field
Submit the password change
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: User Settings: password confirmation mismatch blocks submission
description: Verifies the UI prevents password change when new password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/user-settings
Fill the current password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill a different valid new password into the confirm new password field
Submit the password change
Verify a password confirmation mismatch error is visible

title: Language Toggle: switch to Kannada on landing and persist across navigation into app pages
description: Verifies toggling language to Kannada updates landing content and persists across navigation to generate and billing pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the global language to Kannada
Verify the landing page primary content is displayed in Kannada
Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/generate
Verify generation form labels or placeholders are displayed in Kannada
Navigate to /app/billing
Verify billing page content is displayed in Kannada

title: Language Toggle: toggling on billing changes language and does not show error state
description: Verifies the language toggle works on billing and no error state appears after toggling.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app/billing
Toggle the global language
Verify the billing page language changes
Verify no error state is displayed
